texto: When I first entered the school, I was all set to tie my hair in a ponytail, get a fake tan, and write my homework in pink gel ink. I was prepared to hear girls bragging nonchalantly about the BMWs and diamond earrings they recieved for their birthday. I almost looked forward to hearing the flashlight-wielding nuns tell me to "leave room for the holy ghost" when I danced lewedly with messy-haired prep-school boys
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer Allison sobre temas ligados a educacao. “When I first entered the school, I was all set to tie my hair in a ponytail, get a fake tan, and …” articula educacao, fun, quirky em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e trabalho.

texto: I can see why some people become “beach bunnies”: you don’t have to think about things or even talk when you’re on the beach. You just sit here and feel good about being alive.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jennifer Allison sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I can see why some people become “beach bunnies”: you don’t have to think about things or even ta…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, alive, beach, útil em momentos de beach e beach-bunnies.
